original_text:
### Required Elements Within Sections
- Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller (§1.2).
- Patient quotes: attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, italic or distinguished styling, paired with warm lifestyle imagery.
- Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

quotes: footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller
Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller (§1.2).

rules.intent: Ensure clinical substantiation is traceable and legible without being mistaken for body copy.
rules.rule_text: Any clinical claim must carry a footnote marker (†, footnote.marker.symbol) with its footnote text visually separated from body copy and rendered noticeably smaller (footnote.type), per §1.2.

quotes: Patient quotes: attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, italic or distinguished styling, paired with warm lifestyle imagery.

rules.intent: Keep patient testimonial presentation consistent, authentic, and visually distinct from standard body copy.
rules.rule_text: Patient quotes must be attributed in the exact format '- [Name], LISRAYA patient', styled in italic or otherwise visually distinguished (text_style.patient_quote.italic), and always paired with warm, realistic patient lifestyle photography (image_treatment.photography.warm_lifestyle).

effect.subject: logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI

quotes: all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**
Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

rules.intent: Preserve locked legal/regulatory copy integrity and prevent unauthorized duplication or edits within content sections.
rules.rule_text: The logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI are locked exclusively into the header/footer (top_matter/end_matter) components and must never be reproduced within body sections.
